name: Grid Runner
description: Skeleton env: an agent navigates a grid to a goal while avoiding hazards. Replace the logic in env.py with your own idea.

binding_vow.description: From the top-left corner, reach the goal cell in as few moves as possible without stepping on a hazard. A good agent moves monotonically toward the goal and routes around hazards.

observation_space.description: { grid_size:int, agent:[r,c], goal:[r,c], hazards:[[r,c]...], steps:int, legal_actions:[string] }

reward.description: +10 reaching goal, -10 hazard; +1 step toward goal, -1 step away, -1.5 wall/invalid.
